part.text: I'll move the `NewDerivedReader` function and its test from the `kms` package to the new `libs/crypto` package. Let me start by finding the current definitions and usages.

todos.content: Create libs/crypto package with NewDerivedReader function
Move TestNewDerivedReader test to libs/crypto package
Update all references to use libs/crypto.NewDerivedReader
Remove old definitions from kms package
Run tests to verify the refactoring
